programme.title: Metroland
programme.desc: After ten years absence Toni, Chris's best friend, suddenly reappears in London to bring chaos and doubt into Chris's calm, tranquil, slightly boring, predictable life. Chris starts to remember his carefree youth as a photographer in Paris when he lived with and enjoyed a torrid affair with Annick. It was also in Paris that he first met and fell in love with Marion. The temptations and pressure exerted on Chris by Toni to return to their former carefree life of sex, drugs and rock'n'roll soon starts to have an impact on Chris's marriage. He starts to question his values, his lifestyle choices and his relationship with Marion and even suspects her of starting an affair with Toni whom she dislikes! Eventually circumstances come to a head and Chris is forced to decide whether to follow Toni back to the hedonistic, irresponsible life of his youth or face the harsh realities of the present and stay with Marion.

programme.title: The Road To Wellville

Seeking to improve their health – and their marriage – are Eleanor (Fonda), Kellogg's spellbound devotee, and Will (Broderick), her reluctant but devoted husband. What doesn't kill them in this spa/hospital/grand hotel will only make them stronger as they make their way through an obstacle course of sexual temptations, mechanical contraptions and dietary breakthroughs. Filled with outrageous methodology and hilarious hijinks, this "sumptuously photographed turn-of-the-century comedy with a fine cast" (San Francisco Chronicle) will make you double over ... with laughter!

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.
